name: codex-usage-monitor
description: Read local Codex usage, rate-limit snapshots, and reset credits.

interface.shortDescription: Read Codex usage and quota snapshots.
interface.longDescription: Codex Usage Monitor exposes local read-only MCP tools backed by the Codex Rate Limits Bar app. It queries Codex rate limits, reset credits, account usage, and machine-local token usage without requiring Node.js.
defaultPrompt: Check my Codex quota and local token usage.
